projects.title: Junior Backend Engineer
projects.description:
Responsibilities:
  • Food Search Engineering:
    • Make proxy API to get foods data from Meilisearch inGGL Admin Panel.Such as features:food tag,food synonyms,food search&filter,also improve Meilisearch settings to get better food data.
    • Improve API to get food data from Meilisearch on food search feature inGGL Mobile App&GGL Web App.
  • GGL CMS with Directus CMS:
    • Make ads feature inDirectus CMS&make proxy API fromDirectus CMSso it can be used inGGL Mobile App&GGL Web App.
    • Make proxy API for features GGL Onboarding Video,GGL Video Stories,GGL Workout,GGL Tutorial fromDirectus CMSso it can be used inGGL Mobile App&GGL Web App.
    • Make cache flusher proxy API with Directus Webhook if any data is changed.
    • Migrate data from old database toDirectus CMSdatabase&adjustDirectus CMSsettings to get better performance.
  • GGL Step Counter&Leaderboard:
    • Make step counter API to collect users step data.
    • Make step counter leaderboard API with daily&weekly leaderboard using redis leaderboard&ranking feature.
  • Additional:
    • Bugfix,maintenance,and create new features based on PRD.
    • Review code
    • Implement TDD
    • Implement Porto SAP(Modern Software Architectural Pattern)

projects.title: Backend Developer
projects.description:
Responsibilities:
  • Code refactoring/code improvement and implement TDD [RevivalPedia]
  • Implement and increase integration testing API coverage to existing API [RevivalPedia, RevivaLTV, Revival Livescore]
  • Improve code quality using Larastan: code analysis tool [RevivaLTV, Revival Livescore]
  • Build mobile API from existing API [RevivaLTV New World]
  • RnD & impelement MeiliSearch to existing API for create global search mobile API [RevivaLTV New World]
  • RnD & implement FusionAuth SSO Providers Google to existing Login/Register API (Integration only, FusionAuth is ready) [RevivaLTV]
  • RnD Statamic for replace Wordpress CMS [RevivaLTV News]
  • Bugfix, maintenance, and create new features based on PRD

projects.title: Backend Developer
projects.description:
Responsibilities:
  • Create REST API for every project from client
  • Design & Implementation Database
  • Setup Server on AWS
  • Setup CI/CD on Bitbucket
  • Testing apps & load test before live production with Apache JMeter

projects.title: Software Engineer
projects.description:
Responsibilities:
  • Analyzing software requirements every project from client
  • Composing software design e.g. database design, program flow, frontend and backend of system design
  • Implementing program code (coding) according to the design
  • Testing and validating the program code before it is submitted to the client
